calendar.matters:
Petition To Appoint Jennifer Lee As Successor Trustee Of The Wallace Charles Thompson Revocable Trust; Removal Of Trust From Court-Supervision; Second And Final Report On Waiver Of Accounting; For Approval Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs Advanced; For Payment Of Post Reporting Attorneys Fees According To Proof; And Exoneration Of Bond
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Appoint Jennifer Lee As Successor Trustee Of The Wallace Charles Thompson Revocable Trust; Removal Of Trust From Court-Supervision; Second And Final Report On Waiver Of Accounting; For Approval Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs Advanced; For Payment Of Post Reporting Attorneys Fees According To Proof; And Exoneration Of Bond
Off Calendar May-17-2021 Continued To Jun-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheila Robello, via ZOOM, counsel for Jennifer Lee, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court queries counsel regarding whether she has reviewed the Examiner's notes, specifically, the issues regarding the bond and request for trustee fees. Counsel reports that she believes that the beneficiaries would be amenable to waiving bond. Counsel then turns to the trustee fee issue which she states is based on one percent of the yearly value of the trust. The court then queries counsel regarding the home equity line of credit. Counsel reports that the loan had been approved by the court on May 22, 2013, in the Conservatorship matter. The court then advises counsel that the post-reporting fees were not included in the prayer and order in this matter - the request is withdrawn by counsel in open court.

After discussion between the court and counsel regarding the time frame to file waivers of bond, the Petition to Appoint Jennifer Lee as Successor Trustee, etc., is continued to June 7, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
